votes.rationale: Provides a concrete, deterministic proof that instantiate --all scaffolds all registered role panels for a new motion and is safe to re-run without --force.
Low-risk demo: manifest size is known, dry-run is supported, and the tool is manifest-gated. Confirms idempotency and predictable outputs.
Unanimous consent satisfied; proceed to ratify. This is the right validation motion after adding instantiate and registering role panels.
